sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0)
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not CC in (Select CCtr from CCtrs c inner join Pctrs p on c.Pctr = p.Pctr where p.Hierarchy = 'NICL_MISC')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, BusCat,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC,BusCat, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 > 0 or Amt2 > 0 or Amt3 > 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC,BusCat)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, Crcy, CC,BusCat,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC,BusCat, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 < 0 or Amt2 < 0 or Amt3 < 0) and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, CC,BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL

update TransX set Amt4 = ABS(Amt1), Amt5 = ABS(Amt2), Amt6 = ABS(Amt3), Ledger = 'Z004', PC = '', TTY = '', Flex5 = 'NLS_MISC CCtr reclass (orig cctr)', Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Ledger,Crcy,Flex6,PK,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Flex5,PC,CC,TP,BusCat,TTY,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6) (Select KeyID, Co,Ledger,Crcy,Flex6,(case when PK = '40' then '50' else '40' end) as PK,GL,GLdesc, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2,  round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, 'NLS_MISC CCtr reclass (new cctr)' as Flex5,PC,CC,TP,BusCat,TTY,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set CC = substring(CC,1,4) + 'xxxxxx' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSA051104' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3NSA%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSC051304' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3NSC%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSE0511FX' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3NSE%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSH1057HO' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3NSH%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSS1057HO' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3NSS%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSU051304' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3NSU%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'
update TransX set CC = '3NSS1057HO' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC like '3SNS%' and Flex5 like '%new cctr%'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,  Co, GL, Crcy, CC, BusCat,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID,  Co, GL, Crcy, CC, BusCat,Amt2) values ('[batchID]',
insert into TransX (KeyID,  Co, GL, Crcy, CC, BusCat,Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
